NAVAREA XIX 37/26

BARENTS SEA

GREENLAND

1. ONE SPACE ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED IN PERIOD 19-29 MAR 2026 WITHIN DAILY TIMEFRAME 2000-2100 UTC. DANGER AREAS TO NAVIGATION DUE TO ROCKET CARRIER ELEMENT FALL ARE AS FOLLOWS:



DANGER AREA INNER

A. 68-59.33N 015-28.05E

B. 69-13.37N 015-58.52E

C. 70-53.83N 014-10.90E

D. 70-41.62N 012-51.94E

E. 68-59.33N 015-28.05E



DANGER AREA OUTER

A. 71-03.42N 015-12.97E

B. 74-15.83N 009-52.26E

C. 76-50.36N 003-23.81E

D. 79-11.76N 006-04.25W

E. 79-55.85N 010-21.89W

F. 79-41.45N 011-34.90W

G. 78-03.47N 004-13.39W

H. 76-01.02N 002-00.03E

I. 73-32.12N 007-12.24E

J. 70-30.12N 011-37.50E

K. 71-03.42N 015-12.97E

L. 71-03.42N 015-12.97E



FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 73 60 70 64 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16.

E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO

2. REFERS NORWEGIAN NOTICES TO MARINERS 05/2026
